title: glob: cache key convention documented in one place only
description: lib.rs/evaluator.rs: the 'glob:{pattern}' cache key convention is documented in a comment inside str_matches_glob (evaluator.rs line ~410) but not in cache_glob_pattern (lib.rs) which creates the keys. If someone changes the key format in cache_glob_pattern they will silently break the lookup in str_matches_glob. Add a comment in cache_glob_pattern referencing the expected key format and add a comment in str_matches_glob confirming the matching convention. Or define the prefix as a named constant.
